prompt: Edit image 1 by applying the bold, graphic artistic style and color palette (blue, pink, navy, beige) found in image 2 to the stylized burger illustration.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Restyle the stylized burger illustration within image 1 by adopting the bold, graphic artistic style and distinct color palette present in image 2. Specifically, use the blue, pink, and navy colors from image 2 for the burger's elements, and apply the beige color from image 2 to the background.
